title: Media Collection
description: A collection of media library items for use within Scratch.

$schema.description: The JSON Schema version used for this document.

backdrops.description: A list of backdrops in this collection.

costumes.description: A list of costumes in this collection.

sounds.description: A list of sounds in this collection.

sprites.description: A list of sprites in this collection.

name.description: The name of this item, in English Title Case.

tags.description: Tags associated with the item, in English lower case. Used for filtering and searching.

anyOf.description: This item will inherit its tags from its parent sprite. Must have exactly one parent sprite defined in the same file.

file.description: The path to the image file.

bitmapResolution.description: The resolution multiplier for the bitmap image. New bitmaps should generally use 2.

rotationCenterX.description: The X coordinate of the rotation center, relative to the left edge. Defaults to the image's natural center.

rotationCenterY.description: The Y coordinate of the rotation center, relative to the top edge. Defaults to the image's natural center.

backdrop.description: A backdrop in the Scratch media library

costume.description: A costume in the Scratch media library

sound.description: A sound in the Scratch media library

file.description: The path to the audio file.

rate.description: The sampling rate of the audio file.

sampleCount.description: The number of samples in the audio file.

dataFormat.description: The format of the audio data.

sprite.description: A sprite in the Scratch media library

costumes.description: The list of costumes for the sprite.

items.description: The exact name of a costume defined in this or another file.

sounds.description: The list of sounds for the sprite.

items.description: The exact name of a sound defined in this or another file.
